data.biography: Eric Barrett Winter (born July 17, 1976) is an American actor and former fashion model. He has appeared in the television roles of Rex Brady on the NBC soap opera Days of Our Lives, FBI Special Agent Craig O'Laughlin on the CBS drama series The Mentalist (2010–2012), Dash Gardiner on the Lifetime fantasy-drama series Witches of East End (2013–2014), and Sergeant Tim Bradford on the ABC drama The Rookie. His film appearances include Harold & Kumar Escape from Guantanamo Bay (2008) and The Ugly Truth (2009).
data.name: Eric Winter

data.biography: Eric Barnett Winter (17 de julio de 1976) es un actor y modelo estadounidense, más conocido por haber interpretado a Rex DiMera en la serie Days of Our Lives, aunque también se le puede reconocer por haber interpretado al agente de la CIA Ryan Clayton en el videojuego Beyond: Dos Almas, donde prestó su imagen y voz para crear al personaje.
